## 2. Architecture Diagram Description

> C4 Level 2 — Container Diagram (text description)

**System:** {{System Name}}

**Containers:**

- **{{Container 1, e.g. React Frontend}}** — {{technology}} — {{responsibility}}. Communicates with Backend API via REST/WebSocket.
- **{{Container 2, e.g. FastAPI Backend}}** — {{technology}} — {{responsibility}}. Exposes REST API and WebSocket endpoint.
- **{{Container 3, e.g. PostgreSQL Database}}** — {{technology}} — {{responsibility}}. Accessed by Backend API only.
- **{{Container 4, e.g. Ollama LLM}}** — {{technology}} — {{responsibility}}. Called by Agent Services in Backend.

---

## 4. Technology Stack

| Layer | Technology | Version | Rationale |
|---|---|---|---|
| Backend Framework | FastAPI | 0.111+ | Async, auto OpenAPI docs, FR-023 |
| ORM | SQLModel + SQLAlchemy | 0.0.18+ | Type-safe models, Alembic migration support |
| Database | PostgreSQL | 15+ | NFR-004 |
| Vector Extension | pgvector | 0.5+ | RAG support, NFR-007 |
| Migrations | Alembic | 1.13+ | Schema versioning |
| Frontend | React + Vite + TypeScript | 18+ / 5+ / 5+ | NFR-001 |
| UI Components | shadcn/ui | latest | Dark theme, accessible |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS | 3+ | NFR-001 |
| Container | Docker + Docker Compose | 24+ / 2.24+ | NFR-005 |
| LLM Default | Ollama `qwen3:8b` | latest | FR-023, no API key needed |
| LLM Optional | OpenAI API | latest | FR-023 |

---

## 5. Deployment Design

> Docker Compose services for local development

**Services:**

| Service | Image | Port | Depends On | Key Environment Variables |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `backend` | `python:3.11-slim` | 8000 | `db` | DATABASE_URL, OLLAMA_BASE_URL, OPENAI_API_KEY |
| `frontend` | `node:20-alpine` | 5173 | `backend` | VITE_API_BASE_URL |
| `db` | `pgvector/pgvector:pg15` | 5432 | — | POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD |
| `ollama` | `ollama/ollama` | 11434 | — | — |

## 6. Security Design

**Authentication:** {{Describe approach — JWT / API Key / None for MVP. If deferred, state explicitly.}}

**Input Validation:** {{Pydantic schemas on all API inputs. Max content length enforced at service layer.}}

**Secrets Management:** {{All secrets via environment variables. No hardcoded credentials. .env file in .gitignore.}}

**Rate Limiting:** {{Describe if applicable, or state "Not implemented in MVP 1".}}

---

## 7. Architecture Decisions

| Decision | Options Considered | Chosen | Rationale |
|---|---|---|---|
| LLM Provider | Ollama local, OpenAI API, Hugging Face | Ollama default + OpenAI optional | FR-023: free local dev, no API key required |
| Workflow Engine | DB state machine, LangGraph, Temporal | DB state machine (MVP 1) | Minimise complexity; LangGraph in later MVP |
| Vector Store | pgvector, Qdrant, Pinecone | pgvector | Single DB; migrate to Qdrant if performance needed |
| WebSocket | FastAPI WebSocket, Socket.IO | FastAPI WebSocket | Native to stack, no extra dependency |
| {{Decision}} | {{Options}} | {{Chosen}} | {{Rationale referencing FR-XXX or NFR-XXX}} |
